verdict: EPOCH 21 VALIDATED: checkPermissionWithLearning() is now properly wired into executeTool() in tool-registry.ts. The auto-approve learning layer is fully integrated into the main permission check flow. After 3 approvals, commands auto-approve. The ask→ask→ask→allow cycle is verified. The /permissions check command now shows learning status.

integration_points.change: Replaced checkPermission with checkPermissionWithLearning, added recordApproval() calls after user grants permission
Updated handleCheck to use checkPermissionWithLearning and display learning status
